calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-28-2004 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-28-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES-PLAINTIFF IN PRO PER NASIR PATEL PRESENT. DEFENDANTS IN PRO PER JAMES COLLINS AND ERICA OTTO PRESENT. JPT-SCOTT WEAVER; CLERK-PARAM NATT; CSR-JOANN BRYCE.

CASE SETTLED BY STIPULATION, TERMS AS FOLLOWS:-PLAINTIFF TO HAVE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES LOCATED AT 2048 POLK STREET,RM 214.,SAN FRANCISCO, CA. EXECUTION TO STAY UNTIL 6/23/04.PLAINTIFF CAN JUDGMENT NOW. JUDGMENT IS FOR $3,675.00, DEFT TO PAY $900 BY 6/22/04 AND $900 BY 7/14/04 THEN JUDGMENT IS CONSIDERED SATISFIED. IF DEFT IS OUT BY 6/23/04 AND PAY $1,800 THEN PLAINTIFF TO SET ASIDE JUDGMENT AND FILE A DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE. EACH PARTY TO BEAR THEIR OWN ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS. IF DEFT DOES NOT VACATE IN A TIMELY MANNER THE JUDGMENT IS FOR $3,675.00, RESTITUTION OF THE PREMISES. BOTH DEFENDANTS AGREE TO THE TERMS OF THE AGREEMENT.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-28-2004 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-28-2004 Off Calendar
